headline: Man's 'I Don't Need Therapy' Is The Reason Everyone Around Him Is Now In Therapy
summary: His family has a group chat called 'Jake's Progress.' Jake is not in the chat. 'I'm fine,' Jake said.
fullBody: Jake Denial refuses therapy. His family disagreed. His ex went to therapy 'to process Jake.' His coworkers started therapy 'to cope with Jake.' His dog has a therapist 'for separation anxiety caused by Jake.' Jake is still 'fine.' 'Everyone else is the problem,' Jake said. His family has started a support group for 'people affected by Jake.' Jake is not invited. 'I'm too stable for that,' Jake said.
